title: Status transition acknowledgments must advance the flow

content.principle: When the operator reports or requests a roster/status transition such as 'a2 done', do not stop at local acknowledgment. After confirming the actual state, also state the next concrete action from that new state.
content.why: Pure acknowledgment without next-step guidance breaks the operating rhythm and forces the operator to re-ask for flow continuation.

not_applicable_when: The operator explicitly asks only for factual state confirmation and says not to suggest next steps
The confirmed state does not yet permit a safe next action because critical facts are still unknown
